items.title: Do the Effects of a Preschool Language Intervention Last in the Long Run? A 4-Year Follow-Up Study
items.author: Åste Mjelve Hagen, Kristin Rogde, Monica Melby-Lervåg, Arne Lervåg
items.content: <article>Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. Childhood language interventions appear promising for improving children’s lives and yielding economic returns. However, few studies have evaluated long-term effects of these interventions. Our study did this using a large, cluster-randomized trial of a ...</article>
